fields.lmpsf8q2rhw6s: Left his career after a back injury forced him into an unexpected sabbatical. What started as frustrating downtime became a turning point - he spent two years traveling the Pacific Northwest in a converted van, picking up odd jobs and rekindling a childhood interest in amateur radio. He now lives in a small rented house on the outskirts of Boise, Idaho, where he does freelance cartographic work and volunteers at a local community center on weekends. He's quiet, methodical, and occasionally awkward in conversation, but fiercely loyal to the handful of people he lets close.
